acceptance_answers.can_linkedin_become_governed_connector: Yes, but current state is BLOCKED due critical public-surface risk and missing account/credential/approval evidence.

account_authority: No LinkedIn account mutation is allowed until account ownership, admin authority, credential authority, and revocation evidence exist.
activation_boundary: Readiness, onboarding, package, or review evidence does not authorize LinkedIn production activation, posting, messaging, or account mutation.
blocking_gaps: No LinkedIn production credentials or account authority evidence exists.
Public posting/profile mutation is high-risk and requires explicit human approval plus platform audit evidence.
connector_authority: LinkedIn connector authority must be limited to governed draft/review workflows until production account authority and public action approval evidence exist.
credential_authority: No production LinkedIn credential authority exists yet; repository credential storage is forbidden.
generated_pr_body:
## PURPOSE
PB-091 assesses whether LinkedIn can become a production-governed USBAY connector.

## RISK
LinkedIn affects public reputation and outbound communication. Without explicit account authority, content approval, messaging approval, audit receipts, and revocation controls, public harm could occur.

## POLICY LINK
AGENTS.md fail-closed, audit-first engineering, human oversight, rollback and forensics, network governance, secret/data hygiene, and no false governance state rules. GitHub PB-041 through PB-050, Codex PB-051 through PB-060, Control Plane PB-061 through PB-070, Notion PB-071 through PB-080, Euria PB-081 through PB-090, and PB-040 connector readiness evidence.

## REQUIRED APPROVALS
USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 review are required before merge. This PB does not authorize production activation, LinkedIn API calls, posting, messaging, credential creation, account mutation, or public action.

## GOVERNANCE CHECKS
JSON evidence must parse. Generated metadata, connector authority, account authority, publication authority, messaging authority, approval authority, audit authority, rollback authority, credential authority, reputation-risk controls, fail-closed controls, activation boundary, evidence requirements, and required PR sections must validate.

## AUDIT
PB-091 generates linkedin_readiness_report.json and linkedin_readiness_summary.md.

## IMPACT
USBAY receives an evidence-bound LinkedIn readiness status while production activation remains blocked.

## Decision
VERIFIED

## Status
READY_FOR_REVIEW
messaging_authority: Outbound messaging requires explicit human approval, recipient scope, message audit receipt, privacy review, and opt-out/compliance evidence.
publication_authority: Public content publication requires explicit human approval, content audit receipt, reputation risk assessment, and rollback/takedown path.
required_next_steps: Keep LinkedIn dry-run/draft-only until explicit account authority is proven.
Define human approval and final-review gate for any public action.
Implement production connector last, after non-public connectors are validated.
rollback_authority: USJAY77 under USBAY-AUDIT review until delegated authority exists
title: LinkedIn Readiness Assessment
